testsuite.name: com.example.frere.infrastructure.persistence.mybatis.OrderMapperTest

testcase.name: findById_存在しないIDの場合_nullが返る()
insert_正常なデータの場合_登録できる()
update_ステータスを変更できる()
deleteById_既存データの場合_削除できる()
findById_存在するIDの場合_受注が取得できる()
findAll_データが存在する場合_全件取得できる()
insert_メッセージがnullの場合_登録できる()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-30T16:23:35.163+09:00 INFO 72928 --- [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.frere.infrastructure.persistence.mybatis.OrderMapperTest]: OrderMapperTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-30T16:23:35.168+09:00 INFO 72928 --- [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.frere.FrereApplication for test class com.example.frere.infrastructure.persistence.mybatis.OrderMapperTest
